personal.name: Mehedi Hasan
personal.title: Senior Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Building scalable web apps with Angular, Node & beyond
personal.bio: I'm a Senior Software Engineer with 6 years of experience crafting high-quality web applications. Currently at Brain Station 23, I specialise in Angular and front-end architecture — but I enjoy the full stack, from designing intuitive UIs to shipping reliable Node.js backends and managing cloud deployments. I love learning in public and building side projects that solve real problems.

experience.description: Leading front-end development of enterprise-scale Angular applications serving hundreds of thousands of users.
highlights: Architected and delivered complex Angular SPA modules with strict performance budgets
Introduced micro-frontend patterns, reducing deployment coupling across teams
Mentored junior engineers in Angular best practices, RxJS, and clean code principles
Collaborated with UX designers to build pixel-perfect, accessible component libraries
Championed CI/CD pipelines and automated testing to improve release confidence
Developed and maintained multiple client-facing Angular applications
Integrated REST and GraphQL APIs with reactive Angular services
Optimised load performance, achieving 30% reduction in initial bundle size
Wrote comprehensive unit and e2e test suites with Jest and Cypress

experience.description: Full-stack development of web products for domestic and international clients.
highlights: Built dynamic React and Angular front-ends for client projects from scratch
Developed RESTful APIs in Node.js/Express, deployed on Linux servers
Designed and maintained MySQL and MongoDB databases
Collaborated directly with clients to gather requirements and deliver iteratively
